heading: Significant deviations
label: 11317 Significant deviations
text: The head of each executive agency shall identify in the strategic information resources management plan required under any major information technology acquisition program, or any phase or increment of that program, that has significantly deviated from the cost, performance, or schedule goals established for the program.section 3506(b)(2) of title 44
